creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Good day.

Fri, Aug 03, 2007 at 10:33:55AM +0400, Eygene Ryabinkin wrote:
> Found that situation is even worse that I described earlier: my
> cfengine was linked against the db-4.0, the smallest version that
> were present in the system.  And I had requested db-4.3.
<... the rest was deleted ...>

As the month and a half was passed from my initial submission of
the original PR, maybe someone can commit my modifications?

I understand that it is largely up to the port maintainer to decide
if the commit will go into the ports system.  All I can say is that

- the fixed port is working for me for month and a half and I am
  using CFEngine to maintain about 100 hosts,

- I am ready to take the maintainership for the port (of course,
  if no one objects), since I am invested much into our local
  CFEngine infrastructure and likely will continue to work with it.
-- 
Eygene
